# Parse and backend failures fall back to RTL

`VER-rtl-on-parse-failure`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| verification | draft |

Inspect Planner.decide_with_context: every exception path (JSONDecodeError, general Exception, map composition failure) must return a dict with command=='rtl'. No exception may propagate to the state machine.

**Method:** inspection · **scope:** [CMP-planner](../../system/CMP-mission-computer/CMP-planner/README.md) · **latest outcome:** not-run
